name: genomics_governance_newsroom_s_stonehaven_auto_ben
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Genomics Governance, the situation tagged internally around genomics governance newsroom stonehaven auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Keisha Okoye
agents.identity: I am Keisha Okoye, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Genomics Governance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Arjun Alvarez, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Genomics Governance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Okoye must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Keisha Okoye do?
